zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Lascelles於1185年出生在英國越可爾科比 克諾夫萊時，他的父親Roger Lascelles II26歲，母親Beatrice Wigton24歲。他和Beatrice至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1245年享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Lascelles于1185年出生在英国越可爾科比 克諾夫萊时，他的父亲Roger Lascelles II26岁，母亲Beatrice Wigton24岁。他和Beatrice至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1245年享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lascelles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from one of the large number of places in northern France called Celle, Celles, Lacelle, Leschelle, or Lachelle, all from French celle ‘hermitage’, and at different times occurring both with and without the plural -s.
Variant of   Lacelle   1, a surname of French origin.

variants.name: Laswell
meanings: English: possibly an altered form of   Lascelles  . This surname is also found as   Lacefield  .

variants.name: Lacelle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Andre, Aurele, Benoit, Cecile, Marcel, Marie Paule.
Altered form of French Laselle: habitational name from La Selle, the name of several places in various parts of France. The surname Laselle is very rare in France, found in Marne. Compare Lascelles .

In some cases possibly also French: habitational name from Lacelle in Corrèze or numerous minor places called La Celle, all named for a monastic cell or hermitage in their vicinity, from French celle ‘hermitage’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Lascelles was born in 1185, in Kirby Knowle, Yorkshire, England, his father, Roger Lascelles II, was 26 and his mother, Beatrice Wigton, was 24. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Beatrice. He died in 1245, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Lascelles est né en 1185, à Kirby Knowle, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Roger Lascelles II, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Wigton, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Beatrice. Il est décédé en 1245, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Lascelles 1185 in Kirby Knowle, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Lascelles II 26 und seine Mutter Beatrice Wigton 24. Er hatte mit Beatrice mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1245 im Alter von 60 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Lascelles è nato il nel 1185 nel Kirby Knowle, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Roger Lascelles II, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice Wigton, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Beatrice. Morì nel 1245, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Lascellesが1185年にイギリスヨークシュアイアキルビー ノウルで生まれた時，父Roger Lascelles IIは26歳，母Beatrice Wigtonは24歳であった。彼はBeatriceとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1245年に60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Lascelles(이)가 1185년 영국 요르크실르 커비 노우일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Lascelles II(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice Wigton(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Beatrice(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1245년 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Lascelles nasceu em 1185, em Kirby Knowle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Lascelles II, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice Wigton, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Beatrice. Ele faleceu em 1245, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Lascelles родился в 1185 г. в местности кирби ноул, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Lascelles II было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Wigton, 24. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Beatrice. Он умер в 1245 г. в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Lascelles nació en 1185, en Kirby Knowle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Lascelles II, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Beatrice Wigton, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Beatrice. Murió en 1245, a la edad de 60 años.
